title: HandoffCard
description: STORY-031.1: the facts-only inheritance unit emitted when a story completes. The next story inherits the card, NOT the previous story's context. The card deliberately omits the Developer's reasoning, the debug narrative, and any 'how we got there' — carrying those across stories would anchor the next story to the previous one's framing (the contamination EPIC-030 removed within a story, prevented here between stories). Facts and a pointer only; the full process lives in the trace, reachable via trace_ref.

delivered.description: Capabilities delivered, stated as facts (e.g. cli_entry, core_service) — never how they were built.

touched_files.description: Files used/changed — 'which files', not the diff narrative.

open_threads.description: Unfinished functionality the next story may pick up — facts, not reasoning.

trace_ref.description: Pointer back to the full process in the trace (e.g. trace#evt_4821). The card stays tiny; detail is reachable, not resident.
